meta.title: Products & Services | Applied Engineering & Services
meta.description: Comprehensive industrial solutions including hydraulic equipment, industrial tools, fluid management, thermal solutions, and maintenance services.

header.title: PRODUCTS & OFFERINGS
header.subtitle: Specialized industrial solutions through partnerships with global leaders

productsCatalog.title: FEATURED PRODUCTS
productsCatalog.description: Browse our comprehensive range of industrial equipment and solutions

items.name: Single Acting Hydraulic Jack
items.description: High-capacity single acting hydraulic jack designed for heavy lifting applications. Features precision machined cylinder walls and corrosion-resistant coating for extended durability in harsh industrial environments.

items.name: Double Acting Hydraulic Jack
items.description: Versatile double acting hydraulic jack providing controlled lifting and lowering operations. Ideal for synchronous lifting systems and precision alignment tasks in steel plants and power generation facilities.

items.name: Hydraulic Torque Wrench
items.description: Professional hydraulic torque wrench for precise bolt tightening in heavy industrial applications. Calibrated accuracy ensures consistent clamping force for critical machinery assembly.

items.name: Low Profile Hydraulic Cylinder
items.description: Ultra-low profile hydraulic cylinder designed for confined space operations. Compact design delivers impressive force output for maintenance and repair in tight clearance areas.

items.name: High Pressure Hydraulic Pump
items.description: Industrial-grade high pressure hydraulic pump with precision flow control. Designed for continuous operation in demanding environments with minimal maintenance requirements.

items.name: Hydraulic Hose Assembly
items.description: Heavy-duty hydraulic hose assembly with reinforced steel braiding. Rated for high pressure applications with secure fittings to prevent leaks and ensure operator safety.

items.name: Portable Hydraulic Unit
items.description: Compact portable hydraulic power unit for field service operations. Easy transport with quick-connect fittings for rapid deployment in emergency maintenance situations.

items.name: Hydraulic Lift Table
items.description: Scissor-type hydraulic lift table for material handling and positioning. Stable platform design with safety locks for secure elevated work on heavy components.

items.name: Hydraulic Press Machine
items.description: Industrial hydraulic press for pressing, bending and forming operations. Robust frame construction with precise pressure control for consistent results in metal fabrication.

items.name: Hydraulic Flow Meter
items.description: Digital hydraulic flow meter for system diagnostics and maintenance. Accurate real-time measurement of flow rates to optimize hydraulic system performance.

items.name: Industrial Control Valve
items.description: Precision-engineered industrial control valve for hydraulic and pneumatic systems. Features leak-proof sealing and corrosion-resistant construction for reliable performance.

items.name: Instrumentation Fitting System
items.description: Complete instrumentation fitting system for industrial fluid management. High-pressure rated with superior sealing technology for critical process control applications.

items.name: Ball Valve Assembly
items.description: Stainless steel ball valve assembly for precise flow control in industrial piping systems. Quarter-turn operation with reliable shut-off capability for maintenance isolation.

items.name: Pressure Gauge Kit
items.description: Industrial pressure gauge kit with multiple dial sizes and connection types. Calibrated accuracy for monitoring hydraulic and pneumatic system pressures.

items.name: Tube Fitting Connector
items.description: Compression tube fitting connector for leak-free fluid connections. Double-ferrule design ensures secure grip on tubing without deformation or flow restriction.

items.name: Flow Control Valve
items.description: Adjustable flow control valve for regulating fluid velocity in hydraulic circuits. Fine-tuned adjustment mechanism enables precise flow rate management.

items.name: Heat Exchanger Cleaner
items.description: Specialty industrial cleaning solution for heat exchangers and process equipment. Effectively removes scale, deposits and contaminants to restore optimal thermal efficiency.

items.name: Heat Exchanger Maintenance Kit
items.description: Complete maintenance kit for industrial heat exchanger cleaning and servicing. Includes specialized tools and chemicals for preventive maintenance programs.

items.name: Descaling Compound
items.description: Powerful descaling compound for removing mineral deposits from cooling systems. Safe for use on stainless steel and copper components in heat transfer equipment.

items.name: Cooling Tower Treatment
items.description: Water treatment solution for industrial cooling tower systems. Prevents corrosion, scaling and biological growth to maintain efficient heat rejection performance.

items.name: Condenser Tube Brush
items.description: Rotary condenser tube brush for cleaning heat exchanger tubes. Flexible shaft navigates tube bends while abrasive bristles remove stubborn fouling deposits.

items.name: Chemical Circulation Pump
items.description: Chemical-resistant circulation pump for cleaning solution delivery. Compatible with acidic and alkaline cleaners used in industrial equipment maintenance.

items.name: Tube Inspection Camera
items.description: Borescope camera system for internal inspection of heat exchanger tubes. High-resolution imaging identifies blockages, pitting and corrosion without disassembly.

items.name: Gasket Removal Tool Set
items.description: Specialized tool set for safe removal of gasket material from flange surfaces. Non-scraping design protects sealing surfaces during maintenance turnaround.

items.name: Pressure Testing Kit
items.description: Hydrostatic pressure testing kit for verifying integrity of repaired equipment. Calibrated gauges and certified fittings ensure compliance with safety standards.

items.name: Corrosion Inhibitor
items.description: Film-forming corrosion inhibitor for protecting metal surfaces during cleaning. Prevents flash rusting and extends equipment life between maintenance cycles.

items.name: Spill Control Absorbent
items.description: High-capacity absorbent material for industrial spill containment and cleanup. Rapid absorption of oils, coolants and solvents for safe workplace maintenance.

items.name: Drum Containment System
items.description: Modular drum containment system for safe storage of industrial liquids. Secondary containment design prevents environmental contamination from accidental leaks.

items.name: Absorbent Sock Barrier
items.description: Flexible absorbent sock for containing and directing spills during cleanup. Moldable design conforms to floor contours for effective spill control around machinery.

items.name: Oil-Only Absorbent Pad
items.description: Selective absorbent pad that captures petroleum fluids while repelling water. Ideal for outdoor maintenance and wastewater treatment applications.

items.name: Drip Pan Collection Tray
items.description: Heavy-duty drip pan for collecting leaks from machinery and vehicles. Raised edges contain fluids while graduated markings enable volume tracking.

items.name: Spill Response Cart
items.description: Mobile spill response cart stocked with absorbents, PPE and disposal bags. Enables rapid deployment to spill sites for immediate containment action.

items.name: Drain Protection Cover
items.description: Magnetic drain cover seals floor drains during maintenance operations. Prevents spilled fluids from entering drainage systems and causing environmental issues.

items.name: Universal Absorbent Granules
items.description: Loose absorbent granules for covering large spills and absorbing pooled liquids. Lightweight formula spreads easily and encapsulates hazardous fluids for safe disposal.

items.name: Leak Diverter Tarp
items.description: Overhead leak diverter tarp channels roof and pipe leaks to collection containers. Protects equipment and flooring from water damage during facility maintenance.

items.name: Spill Kit Storage Cabinet
items.description: Weather-resistant cabinet for storing spill response supplies outdoors. Clear labeling and organized compartments enable quick access during emergencies.

items.name: Hazmat Disposal Bag
items.description: Heavy-duty disposal bag for contaminated absorbents and spill cleanup materials. Meets regulatory requirements for proper waste segregation and disposal.

items.name: Professional Impact Wrench
items.description: Heavy-duty impact wrench for industrial maintenance and assembly operations. High torque output with ergonomic design for reduced operator fatigue during extended use.

items.name: Cordless Power Drill Kit
items.description: Professional cordless drill kit with brushless motor technology. Extended battery life and variable speed control for versatile drilling and fastening applications.

items.name: Angle Grinder
items.description: Industrial angle grinder for cutting, grinding and surface preparation. Adjustable guard and anti-vibration handle enhance safety and operator comfort.

items.name: Rotary Hammer Drill
items.description: SDS rotary hammer drill for concrete and masonry drilling. Three-mode operation includes rotation-only for wood and metal drilling applications.

items.name: Circular Saw
items.description: Professional circular saw for precise cutting of lumber and sheet materials. Laser guide and dust blower ensure accurate cuts in construction applications.

items.name: Jigsaw Tool
items.description: Variable speed jigsaw for curved and intricate cutting operations. Tool-free blade change and orbital action settings adapt to different material thicknesses.

items.name: Premium Industrial Fastener Set
items.description: High-strength industrial fastener set including bolts, nuts and washers. Corrosion-resistant coating ensures long-term reliability in harsh industrial environments.

items.name: Threadlocker Compound
items.description: Medium-strength threadlocker for preventing fastener loosening from vibration. Removable with hand tools for maintenance while securing joints during operation.

items.name: Assembly Lubricant
items.description: Anti-seize assembly lubricant for threaded connections and press fits. Prevents galling and corrosion to enable future disassembly of critical joints.

items.name: Structural Adhesive
items.description: High-strength structural adhesive for bonding metal components. Two-part epoxy formulation provides exceptional shear strength and chemical resistance.

items.name: Chemical Anchor System
items.description: Chemical anchoring system for securing bolts in concrete and masonry. Injectable resin bonds studs into drilled holes for maximum load capacity.

items.name: Torque Seal Marker
items.description: Breakaway torque seal marker for indicating fastener tampering or loosening. Bright color provides visual indication of bolt movement for safety inspections.

partners.description: We collaborate with leading international brands to bring you the best industrial solutions

list.name: JKET Chennai
list.description: Specialty maintenance chemicals and industrial cleaning equipment, including heat exchanger cleaning services.

list.name: New Pig India
list.description: Innovative solutions for industrial liquid management and spill cleanup, featuring the original PIG absorbent sock.

list.name: Fluid Controls
list.description: Complete range of instrumentation hardware, including valves and fittings tailored for diverse industrial needs.

list.name: Boyd Inc.
list.description: Trusted material handling and hydraulic lifting equipment for industrial applications.

list.name: GM Industries
list.description: High-quality induction heaters, pullers, and hydraulic jacks for various applications.

list.name: Stanley Black & Decker
list.description: A full range of hand tools, power tools, and storage solutions under brands like Stanley, Black+Decker, and DeWalt.

list.name: Würth
list.description: Premium quality fasteners, adhesives, sealants, tools, and workshop consumables widely used in automotive and industrial sectors.
